sentences.arabic: تُمَثِّلُ الْقَهْوَةُ الْعَرَبِيَّةُ جُزْءًا لَا يَتَجَزَّأُ مِنَ التُّرَاثِ الثَّقَافِيِّ، إِذْ تَرْتَبِطُ بِقَوَانِينَ صَارِمَةٍ وَآدَابٍ تَعْكِسُ رُقِيَّ التَّعَامُلِ مَعَ الضَّيْفِ.
sentences.translation: Arapska kafa predstavlja neraskidiv dio kulturne baštine, jer je vezana za stroga pravila i bontone koji odražavaju sofisticiranost ophođenja s gostom.
sentences.translationEn: Arabic coffee represents an integral part of cultural heritage, as it is associated with strict rules and etiquette that reflect the sophistication of dealing with a guest.

sentences.arabic: يَتِمُّ إِعْدَادُ الْقَهْوَةِ بِعِنَايَةٍ فَائِقَةٍ عَنْ طَرِيقِ تَحْمِيصِ الْبُنِّ وَإِضَافَةِ الْهَيْلِ، مِمَّا يَمْنَحُهَا رَائِحَةً زَكِيَّةً تَمْلَأُ أَرْجَاءَ الْمَجْلِسِ.
sentences.translation: Kafa se priprema s velikom pažnjom prženjem zrna i dodavanjem kardamoma, što joj daje prijatan miris koji ispunjava prostorije medžlisa.
sentences.translationEn: Coffee is prepared with great care by roasting the beans and adding cardamom, which gives it a pleasant aroma that fills the halls of the majlis.

sentences.arabic: جَرَتِ الْعَادَةُ أَنْ يُقَدِّمَ الْمُضِيفُ الْقَهْوَةَ لِضُيُوفِهِ بِالْيَدِ الْيُمْنَى، مُبْتَدِئًا بِالْأَكْبَرِ سِنًّا تَقْدِيرًا لِمَكَانَتِهِ وَاحْتِرَامًا لَهُ.
sentences.translation: Uobičajeno je da domaćin gostima kafu poslužuje desnom rukom, počevši od najstarijeg iz uvažavanja njegovog statusa i poštovanja prema njemu.
sentences.translationEn: It is customary for the host to serve coffee to his guests with the right hand, starting with the eldest in appreciation of his status and out of respect for him.

sentences.arabic: يُرَافِقُ الْقَهْوَةَ دَائِمًا تَمْرٌ فَاخِرٌ، حَيْثُ يُوَازِنُ مَذَاقُ التَّمْرِ الْحُلْوُ مَرَارَةَ الْقَهْوَةِ، مِمَّا يَخْلُقُ تَنَاغُمًا فَرِيدًا فِي الطَّعْمِ.
sentences.translation: Kafu uvijek prate vrhunske hurme, pri čemu slatki ukus hurmi balansira gorčinu kafe, stvarajući jedinstvenu harmoniju ukusa.
sentences.translationEn: Coffee is always accompanied by premium dates, where the sweet taste of the dates balances the bitterness of the coffee, creating a unique harmony in taste.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ هَذَا الطَّقْسَ الْيَوْمِيَّ لَيْسَ مُجَرَّدَ تَنَاوُلٍ لِمَشْرُوبٍ، بَلْ هُوَ رِسَالَةُ تَرْحِيبٍ صَامِتَةٍ تُعَبِّرُ عَنِ الْمَوَدَّةِ وَالرَّغْبَةِ فِي إِكْرَامِ الزَّائِرِ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj svakodnevni ritual nije samo konzumiranje napitka, već tiha poruka dobrodošlice koja izražava naklonost i želju da se gost počasti.
sentences.translationEn: This daily ritual is not just about consuming a drink, but a silent message of welcome that expresses affection and the desire to honor the visitor.
